---
title: "kctolli.github.io"
output: github_document
---

```{r load_libraries, include=FALSE}
source("./site_libs/site.R")
load_libraries()
user <- "kctolli"
```

* ePortfolio: https://kctolli.github.io/
* Resume: https://kctolli.github.io/site_libs/resume.html

```{r}
pander::pander(glue::glue('<a href="https://github.com/{user}/{user}.github.io">
<img align="center" src="https://github-readme-stats.vercel.app/api/pin/?username={user}&repo={user}.github.io&theme=material-palenight" /></a>'))
```
